programmes.show_description: Michael heads off route via an area known for bandit attacks before taking to the stunning River Ethiope. Also finds himself at the centre of an extraordinary 'megachurch' service.
Judge Rinder rules the courtroom in his hit series, but now the respected barrister with a criminal defence background steps out from behind the bench to take on real cases.
This channel is currently off air.
Members of the local constabulary patrol the town of Ashfordly and the nearby village of Aidensfield, keeping the peace whilst also dealing with local loveable rogues.
As a mysterious force rises over Middleton, Cassie, Abigail and Joy embark on a season-long quest to triumph over the biggest threat their Merriwick magic has ever faced.
From the planets most stunning state of the art structures to its mightiest modern machines, none would have been possible without the pioneering engineers of the past.
In a new social experiment, a group of celebrity pensioners head to India to live under one roof for a summer of discovery.
For years fishermen have been vanishing in Alaska's remote and unforgiving wilderness - their deaths unseen, their bodies never found.
Documentary series following the busy mountain vets at the ancient Kingdom of Mourne
Bellamy is struggling to organise a Talent Contest on behalf of the Ashfordly Football Club which he belongs to.
Daria and Emma have seven days to drop some pounds for a party. Bridesmaids Emma and Elisa test drive a six week diet plan. And Dom and Adam prepare to slim over four months.
Award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi continues her quest to turn the UK's hotels of horror into relaxing retreats.
Charity is concerned. Cain has a fit of rage. Charity tries to reassure Cain.
Theo stuns Todd by suggesting they get married right away, Bernie experiences divided loyalties to her son and husband, and Will struggles with being the focus of local gossip.
Carnegie questions Weatherill's competence after a day at the beach ends in tragedy for a local family.
When Detective Inspector Jack Frost investigates the death of a local gigolo, he becomes interested in one of his clients for more than professional reasons.
Nick is called out one evening to investigate a domestic quarrel which may involve the safety of a baby.
The case that gripped Australians and many people around the world.
Bernie pays Mal a visit in his hotel room, George gains an insight into Theo's treatment of Todd, Ben feels guilty for letting Will down, and Jodie offers Carla her childminding services.
Robert is accused. Joe's stunned. Chas and Kim form an unlikely bond.
Fitz is asking DCI Wise to replace him with Irene as the killer may stop killing if she realises she is not getting the shrink's undivided attention.
Tragedy strikes at the heart of Harry's unit as the siege drags on in Tobruk. In Manchester, Kasia is confronted by more of the horrors of the war.
Barrister Robert Rinder examines real-life cases, revealing how ground-breaking forensic technology was used to track down the killer of 87-year-old Gladys Godfrey.

Jeremy goes to Fiji to investigate reports of people being attacked underwater and tries to find out if there are multiple culprits or if a single perpetrator is to blame.
As winter morphs into spring, lambing and calving keeps the team busy out on the farms. Back at base, practice founder Martin Fitzpatrick faces a difficult case

The weight loss regimes tested this time include the High-Fat, the Mediterranean, the Cookie and the Paleo, and a diet where a protein solution is fed straight into the tummy

While treating a sick baby, Dr Goodwin uncovers dark secrets its parents would prefer to keep hidden, while Rose and Ormerod have an adventure at a hippy encampment.
When a beautiful woman is found dead in a car park, the list of suspects leads Jack Frost into the heart of a religious community where someone is thinking impure thoughts.
Aidensfield appears to be undergoing something of a crime-wave.
Vigil is forced into lockdown as disaster strikes. With communication lost, Kirsten desperately hunts for clues to the source of the threat to Vigil.
Prime Suspect 6, sees Tennison's single minded determination to get justice for murder victims at all costs conflicting sharply with the politics of her high ranking position.
